message:
feat(storage_telemetry): Cx-first append_batch_instrumented_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Add `InstrumentedStorage::append_batch_instrumented_with_cx(cx, req,
result, start, backend)` Cx-first sibling of
`append_batch_instrumented`. Pre-flight checkpoint gates the
telemetry recording so cx-driven callers can propagate cancellation
consistently through the telemetry pipeline.

On cancellation, returns the original append result unchanged
(telemetry simply is not recorded for this call) so caller error
semantics are fully preserved — the wrapper can only ever add or
skip telemetry, never alter the underlying storage result.

Legacy `append_batch_instrumented` preserved unchanged.

Regression test `append_batch_instrumented_with_cx_matches_legacy`
pins telemetry parity: after a 3-event AppendLog batch, the cx-first
path must increment COUNTER_BATCHES_PROCESSED to 1,
COUNTER_EVENTS_APPENDED to 3, and the backend-dimensioned batches
counter to 1 — identical to the legacy path.

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target): 65/65 storage_telemetry tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
